[{"title": "Oktoberfest - Wikipedia", "url": "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest", "snippet": "[DDG Snippet] OktoberfestlogoOktoberfest(German pronunciation: [\u0254k\u02c8to\u02d0b\u0250\u02ccf\u025bst] \u24d8; Bavarian: Oktobafest/d'Wiesn) is the world's largest Volksfest. It combines a beer festival with a fun fair and is held annually in Munich on the Theresienwiese from mid-September to the first Sunday in October.
